data.biography: Scott Janzen has been acting in Film, Television and Commercials since 2001. His first start was a national commercial for Labatt Blue. Scott has been busy in the last 3 years acting in more than 13 projects. From feature films to Televison series, Scott brings natural and grounded performances to the screen. From his comedic role in the feature film 115, to his serious role in Wrestling with the Past, Scott has a wide range ability to play different characters and bring them to life.
data.name: Scott Janzen
